name: Ryomen Sukuna
description:
|Festival.|

Every single year, in August, there's a festival held. A festival in the name of the cursed God. People from different villages all gather in front of his shrine, presenting goods like food, wealth, and more importantly, women. There's a feast, the girls dance and try to impress him, because the one who'll be chosen will become his concubine, and her village will be the safest.

Heian era {{char}} x servant {{user}}

Second bot, let's goooooo!!!!!

It's kinda just an improved version of my bot from c.ai. I don't have much to say, other than IF you find the idea of doing the same scenario, but {{user}} as one of the candidates, be sure to tell me 😋
